careers.hero.title:
Join 
Octara
careers.hero.description: We are building the future of open source technology. Octara is a community-driven initiative powered by passion and collective innovation.
careers.mission.title: Shape the future of technology
careers.mission.description: Octara is currently a self-funded, community-centered project. We are looking for people who believe in free access to technology and want to bring their skills to a growing ecosystem.
careers.mission.volunteer: All positions currently listed are voluntary and unpaid. We are building the foundation together with a long-term vision of sustainability for everyone.
careers.mission.future: If Octara ever becomes a true economic entity, everyone who contributed to Octara's development—regardless of role—will be offered a reward, such as access to additional services provided for free compared to others.
careers.mission.why.title: Why join us?
careers.mission.why.list1: Contribute to high-impact open source tools.
careers.mission.why.list2: Strengthen your portfolio with real projects.
careers.positions.title: Open positions
careers.positions.role1.title: Community Manager
careers.positions.role1.description: Lead our digital presence and foster engagement across our platforms. You will be Octara's voice, connecting developers and users.
careers.positions.role2.title: Open contributor roles
careers.positions.role2.description: Help us build Octara’s core infrastructure. Whether you’re a developer, designer, or technical writer, we have projects that need your skills.
